query: Compare major cloud providers on enterprise AI governance offerings
note: Mock sources for local demo and tests. Not real retrieval results.

sources.title: Cloud Provider A: AI Governance Framework Overview
sources.author: Cloud Provider A Documentation Team
sources.content: Cloud Provider A offers a model registry, lineage tracking, automated bias evaluations, and policy-based access controls for enterprise AI workloads. Customers can attach governance policies to model deployments and receive audit logs.

sources.title: Responsible AI Toolkit — Cloud Provider B
sources.author: Cloud Provider B AI Team
sources.content: Cloud Provider B's Responsible AI toolkit includes fairness dashboards, explainability reports, and a content safety service. Customers configure governance at the workspace level rather than per-model.

sources.title: Analyst Brief: Cloud AI Governance Comparison 2026
sources.author: Sample Analyst Firm
sources.content: Major cloud providers converged on three governance pillars in 2026: model lineage, automated evaluation, and policy enforcement. Differentiators are increasingly in the depth of audit logging and integration with enterprise IAM.

sources.title: Regulator Guidance: Enterprise AI Governance Expectations
sources.author: Sample Regulator
sources.content: Enterprises deploying AI systems must maintain documentation of training data provenance, evaluation results, and incident response procedures. Cloud-hosted systems are not exempt; the burden of evidence remains with the deployer.
